subcodes.first_line: After perusal of thy letter, it was presented in its entirety at the Most Holy Court [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بعد از ملاحظه کتاب آنجناب در ساحت اقدس عرض شد یعنی خود آن مکتوب بتمامه
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
